ham.subject: Reminder: Semester Project Submission Deadline – 12th April
ham.body:
Hello Professor Smith,

I hope you are doing well. This is a friendly reminder that the deadline for the semester project (Course Code: CS101) is on Thursday, 12th April 2024, at 11:59 PM. Please ensure that you have uploaded your final report to the course portal before the cutoff.

If you have any questions or need clarification, feel free to reach out.

Thank you for your guidance.

Best regards,
Alex Johnson
Student ID: 123456

spam.subject: Immediate Action Required: Your FedEx Delivery Fee
spam.body:
Dear Valued Customer,

We regret to inform you that your recent FedEx shipment (Tracking #987654321) was not delivered due to an outstanding delivery fee of $45.00. If the fee is not paid within 48 hours, your package will be returned to the sender and you may be liable for additional handling charges.

To avoid this, please complete the payment immediately by logging into your FedEx account at <URL> and entering your payment details. Failure to do so will result in further penalties and possible legal action.

Thank you for your prompt attention.

Sincerely,
FedEx Customer Service Team
